metaTitle: WPA Journal · Charter · Coming Soon — World Protocol Academy
metaDesc: WPA Journal — a specialised international interdisciplinary journal of protocol, diplomacy, public communication, security and communicology. Phase 0 — Charter. Fair Access. Submission free. Peer review free. Symbolic fee only on acceptance. Waivers available.
k004: A specialised international interdisciplinary journal of World Protocol Academy. A platform for scholars, practitioners and institutions from all regions — with particular attention to those under-represented in mainstream Western academic channels.
k005: Submission free. Peer review free for the author. Symbolic fee only on acceptance. Waivers available. No payment for acceptance. No paid ranking.
k009: Inaugural Issue Preview · Volume I · Issue I
k011: Inaugural Issue · Protocol, diplomacy, public communication, security and communicology. Digital flipbook edition of the inaugural issue.
k013: Doctrine: „Negotiation is optional. Protocol is absolute.”
k017: Documented practice by a professional in the field. 3,000–6,000 words.
k019: Structured analysis of a specific case. 4,000–8,000 words.
k023: Analysis of a protocol scenario. 3,000–6,000 words.
k025: Review of a book in the field. 1,000–2,500 words.
k029: Documented interview, with signed consent. 2,000–5,000 words.
k055: WPA Journal explicitly accepts authors and institutions from all 15 global regions:
k086: Read the WPA Journal Submission Policy and the WPA Fair Access Publishing & Indexing Policy.
k087: Complete the WPA Journal Submission Form (including AI usage declaration, conflict of interest, ethics consent, security sensitivity, waiver request if applicable).
k088: Prepare the manuscript according to WPA format (B5 or A4, usually 1.5 line spacing, Garamond or similar serif).
k089: You receive an acknowledgement of receipt and a WPA submission ID within 5 working days.
k090: Desk review (7–14 days) → decision to proceed / desk reject / revise.
k092: Editorial decision: accept · minor revisions · major revisions · reject.
k093: Only on acceptance — symbolic publication fee (with waivers available).
k094: Production: copy-editing, layout, citation check, DOI registration and archiving.
k096: WPA Journal uses a multi-layered peer review:
k097: All correction and retraction notices are publicly available.
k103: No payment for acceptance. No payment for faster peer review. No paid ranking.
m001: W World Protocol Academy · WPA Journal · Skopje, Republic of North Macedonia
m002:
WPA Journal of Protocol, Diplomacy,
Public Communication, Security & Communicology
m004: Full name: WPA Journal of Protocol, Diplomacy, Public Communication, Security & Communicology.
m006: Publisher: World Protocol Academy, a specialised independent institute based in Skopje, Republic of North Macedonia.
m007: Mission: To be a unique international academic and practitioner platform for state protocol, diplomacy, defence diplomacy, public communication, public relations, crisis communication, security studies, communicology, ceremonial studies, institutional reputation and protocol education.
m008: State protocol · protocol of state institutions, state ceremonial, order of precedence, flag protocol.
m009: Diplomatic protocol · protocol of diplomatic meetings, treaty signing, accreditations, immunity.
m010: Diplomacy and international relations · theory and practice of diplomatic interaction.
m011: Defence diplomacy · defence diplomacy, military protocol, security coordination.
m012: Public communication and PR · institutional communication, reputation management.
m013: Crisis communication · protocol structure of crisis response.
m014: Communicology · scholarly studies of communication in an institutional context.
m015: Security and strategic studies · non-kinetic security, grey-zone, protocol-as-signal.
m016: Practitioner evidence · documented practice with signed consent.
m017: Protocol education · curriculum studies, didactic frameworks, learning outcomes.
m018: WPA Journal is committed to the principle of access without compromising integrity. Submission, peer review and editorial decision are free. A symbolic fee applies only on acceptance. Waivers are available for students, early-career authors and authors from lower-income regions.
m019: Strict rules: No payment for acceptance. No payment for faster peer review. No payment for guaranteed publication. No hidden fees. Reviewers do not know waiver status.
m020: Send the manuscript + submission form + all supporting documents to worldprotocolacademy@gmail.com.
m021: Editorial screening · format, length, relevance, AI declaration, conflict of interest, ethical consents. 7–14 days.
m022: Peer review · double-blind where possible (research articles, methodology notes); practitioner review for practitioner articles; editorial review for book reviews and teaching notes.
m023: AAB review · flagship articles introducing new conceptual frameworks into WPA doctrine pass through the Academic Advisory Board.
m024: Reviewer independence: Reviewers do not know whether the author pays a publication fee or has a waiver. A reviewer with a conflict of interest is excluded.
m025: All articles that used AI assistance (drafting, translation, language editing, citation suggestion) must include an AI Transparency Note in the header. AI cannot be listed as a co-author. AI cannot fabricate citations. All AI-generated parts pass through human review.
m026: Correction for minor errors (typo, wrong date, wrong reference) — via a Correction Notice attached to the original article.
m027: Retraction for serious cases (fabricated citations, plagiarism, breach of consent, breach of ethics) — a Retraction Notice published together with the original article; the original remains clearly marked „RETRACTED”.
m028: Transparent status: WPA Journal is currently in Phase 0 — Charter. WPA does not claim indexing in Scopus, Web of Science, DOAJ, Google Scholar, Crossref, ORCID, ResearchGate or AD Scientific Index. All indexing locations are planned / intended / under development. WPA Journal will apply for each location once eligibility criteria are met.
m029: ISSN · application planned once the journal meets the eligibility criteria.
m030: DOI / Zenodo · Zenodo archival record planned after publication; Crossref DOI registration planned for a later indexing phase.
m031: DOAJ · application intended once eligibility criteria are met.
m032: Scopus / Web of Science · under development — WPA will apply once eligibility criteria are met.
m033: Google Scholar · discoverability after publication is targeted but depends on crawler indexing; it is not claimed.
m034: Phase 0 — Charter (current): Charter Public Page (this page) → AAB review.
m035: Phase 1 — Editorial Board: Formation with signed consents. International members will be published after written consent.
m036: Phase 2 — Public Charter: AAB-approved Charter → public publication.
m037: Phase 3 — Inaugural Issue Flipbook (current): Volume I · Issue I — available as a separate page: vol-1-issue-1-2026.html.
m038: Phase 4 — First Call: First call for articles for the next issue.
m039: Phase 5 — Zenodo & ISSN/DOI: Zenodo archiving after publication; applications for ISSN and Crossref DOI once eligibility criteria are met.
m040: Phase 6 — Indexing: Applying for DOAJ, Scopus, Web of Science once criteria are met.
m041: Phase 7 — Stable: Regular two or three issues per year.
m042: All dates are planned and forthcoming. WPA does not claim definitive deadlines until they are delivered.
m043: Submission, peer review, correction, takedown, AAB appeals: worldprotocolacademy@gmail.com
m045: WPA Journal is in an active formation phase. This page is the journal’s current charter / landing page. The inaugural flipbook is available as a separate page: vol-1-issue-1-2026.html.
m046: We do not claim ISSN or DOI until they are formally assigned. All indexing labels are „planned / intended / under development”.
m047: Fair Access: Submission free. Peer review free for the author. Symbolic fee only on acceptance. Waivers available.
